trait Conductor
  def startController(participants, name, controllerPort) → Future[InetSocketAddress]
  def sockAddr → Future[InetSocketAddress]
  def throttle(node, target, direction, rateMBit) → Future[Done]

  def passThrough(node, target, direction) → Future[Done]
  def disconnect(node, target) → Future[Done]
  def abort(node, target) → Future[Done]
  def exit(node, exitValue) → Future[Done]
